title: osmanthus fordii
intro: Osmanthus fordii, also known as the Chinese rose or tea olive, is a flowering shrub native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and dark green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus fordii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. In herbal preparations, Osmanthus fordii is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is valued for its calming and soothing properties.
